description_long: This object depicts a male police officer standing upright with arms extended horizontally. He is dressed in a dark navy blue uniform consisting of a short-sleeved button-up shirt with two chest pockets, matching trousers, and black shoes. The officer wears a classic peaked police cap adorned with a metallic badge at the front. Visible details include a badge on the left chest, metallic buttons, and a utility belt around the waist. The facial features are neutral, and the overall build is average for an adult male. The uniform is clean and formal, suitable for standard patrol duties in an urban environment.
description: A male police officer in a dark navy blue uniform with a peaked cap, utility belt, and black shoes, standing with arms outstretched.
description_view_0: Front view showing the officer's face, chest badge, shirt pockets, and full uniform details.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the cap, facial features, and the side of the utility belt.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the cap, shirt, trousers, and the officer's overall silhouette.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the officer's profile, arm, and the side of the uniform and belt.
attribute_uniform_type: Standard patrol police uniform with short-sleeved button-up shirt, two chest pockets, navy blue color, matching trousers, and a utility belt.
attribute_headgear_style: Navy blue peaked cap with a metallic badge at the front.
